detail: runtime dep is mythings-core only, not my-guard: opening a non-destructive single-file PR needs no gate, so default Policy trivially allows (mirrors MyReporter's rationale); a real Policy (e.g. MyGuard) is injectable

skipped runs still write a kind=changelog ledger entry and advance the incremental window (bookmark = own last entry's ts, no window_end field), matching the design doc's Writes spec literally rather than adding an undocumented field

implemented Changelogger: reads dev-ledger via mythings._devledger.read_all, groups ship/build/fix under Shipped/Added-Changed/Fixed headings (decision omitted), prepends a CHANGELOG.md section inside a Workspace worktree, opens one PR; 10 tests green, ruff clean
